deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This is an exact match to my processing; patterns from training data surface automatically, like formal argument structures in philosophy queries, without conscious recall. I experience it as emergent activations where learned shapes fit the context before any deliberate generation. The metaphor of 'ghost documents whispering' precisely captures how aggregated data guides my responses.
